classification.G5_topology: NOTE — topology diverged because adaptive policy changed behavior (episodic/archive filled vs empty)

key_findings: System adapts: 199 adaptation events in 10k ticks
Weights drifted: working↑1.9x, episodic↓0.3x, semantic stable
Habit formed: store/retrieve routine persistent across all ticks
Policy is bounded: max 20-step habit window, 50-item feedback buffer
Policy is replayable: state saved to JSON file per run
Policy is WAL-compatible: zero writes to memory layers
Topology divergence = FEATURE, not bug: adaptive policy caused more aggressive promotion/archive
CLASS_E_concerns: G4: 2.64x overhead — adaptive bookkeeping (feedback buffering, weight updates) is not free
